/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/Shapez_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/belt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/comletePage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/cutter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/gameMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/helpPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/hub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/mainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/miner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/mineral.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/parameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/shopPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/trash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/src/welcomePage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Shapez.dir/Shapez_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_assets.cpp.o -o Shapez -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtNetwork.framework/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
